name: template-overlays
title: Overlays
description: Overlay-driven CRUD screen — Popover filter flyout, Modal create/edit form, destructive confirm Modal, and a per-row DropdownMenu action menu. The reference for how overlays compose in an ERP list view.
postInstall: Swap SEED for your data source and replace the saveForm/confirmDelete/duplicate handlers with API calls.
Mount a <Toaster /> once at your app root so the toast() confirmations render (the shell-doc / shell-minimal templates already do this).
Next.js: move to src/app/orders/page.tsx. Vite: route via <Route path='/orders' element={<OverlaysPage />} />.
